action.reasoning: Observation: 2-epoch CLIP-B/16 baseline gives val worst-region 0.4545 (Africa), overall 0.5763. Each epoch takes ~55s (42s train+13s val). Pipeline works. Analysis: I should submit baseline eval to confirm it works on test, then scale up. CLIP-L/14 should give significant boost. With 4x48GB and ~9.9h budget, I can do CLIP-L/14 with many epochs. Let me first submit eval to validate test pipeline works, while in parallel planning bigger run. Decision: Submit eval of current checkpoint to validate predict.py contract works end-to-end. This costs minimal time.
